title: Object Reveal
result_description: As you walk across frame, text or a logo is revealed on the wall behind you — appearing in your wake while you pass in front of it.

inputs.name: walk_clip
inputs.what_to_film: On a locked-off camera, walk across the frame using your eyeline to look at the empty spot where the text/logo will be revealed.

capture_requirements.note: single take; pre-focus on where you'll stand

params.note: add and scale the text/logo/sticker over the wall spot; decide final scale now
stretch it over the full clip duration so it's static, then export this composite and re-import it as a flattened plate
build a 3-layer sandwich: bottom = original plate, middle = text-baked plate, top = original plate; all in/out points must match
cut yourself out so you sit in front of the revealed text
keep the mask line tucked behind your body; the cutout hides the mask edge
keyframe the mask to follow your body across frame (set few keyframes: start, middle, end, then refine)
if it hides instead of reveals, hit Reverse/invert so the text reveals as you walk past

result.description: Text/logo is revealed on the wall in the wake of your walk, with you passing in front of it.
success_criteria: Reveal tracks your body cleanly with no visible mask line
You appear in front of the revealed text via the cutout
